description: From the manufacturer Which Dream Coat Is Right For You? Dream Coat Supernatural Spray Advanced anti-frizz formula leaves hair super glossy, glassy, ultra smooth. Best For Straight, wavy, or curly hair that gets frizzy The Results Glassy-sleek, straight, frizz-free styles that last 3-4 shampoos. Benefits Long-lasting frizz-free hair no matter the weather. Extra Strength Dream Coat Extra powerful Dream Coat Award-winning waterproofing technology blocks out humidity + locks in moisture. Best For Extremely dry, dehydrated hair or extremely curly/coily hair The Results Glassy-sleek, straight, frizz-free styles that last 3-4 shampoos. Benefits Long-lasting frizz-free hair no matter the weather. Dream Coat for Curly Hair One-step to frizz-free curls Combined benefits of gels, serums + creams without crunch, greasiness or weight. Best For Wavy or curly hair The Results Glossy, bouncy, frizz-free curls. Benefits Weightless, crunch-free curls; alcohol-free + non-drying.
